charts.title: Physical memory remaining after compression
charts.description: Normalized against an equivalent uncompressed baseline of 100%. Lower is better. Values are derived from published reduction factors and are not new measurements.

items.label: Compressed KV attention
items.scope: kernel benchmark; midpoint shown for visualization

charts.title: Measured speedup in direct-access workloads
charts.description: Relative speedup versus the comparison path reported by each benchmark. These workloads and baselines are different and should not be combined into a single product-wide speed claim.

rules: A chart must not create a stronger claim than its source registry entry.
Derived values must state the formula or source factor.
Ranges must remain ranges in visible labels even when a midpoint is used for bar geometry.
Different benchmark baselines must not be presented as directly interchangeable.
